gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall, gently angles the torso toward the colorful objects, and sweeps both arms outward to show the groups.
a person steps forward slightly, opens hands wide and smiles, as if inviting learners to join in the exciting learning ahead.
a tutor points toward the imaginary group of three red blocks and then shifts to the side to indicate the two blue blocks nearby.
a person brings both hands together in front, as if merging the groups, and leans slightly forward while encouraging participation.
a tutor extends both arms outward and gently sways side to side, inviting learners to count together in an engaging manner.
a person enthusiastically raises both arms upward and counts aloud, emphasizing each number with engaging motions and a big smile.
a tutor claps hands together in celebration and nods, conveying excitement about the lesson learned with a cheerful expression.
a person gestures forward with open hands while speaking, reinforcing the idea of joining groups as an important part of learning addition.
